title: schc/codec: BitWriter.write() loop has non-obvious bit-reversal
description: In codec.rs:82-94, BitWriter::write() iterates bits in reverse order using 'for i in (0..nbits).rev()'. While this is correct for MSB-first network bit order, the loop logic requires careful reading. Add brief comment explaining the reversal: 'Reverse order because network bit order is MSB-first but we index from LSB.'
close_reason: Added comment explaining MSB-first bit reversal in BitWriter.write()
